snippets.src:
Definition a : nat :=
  let '(x, y) := (1, 2) in
  let ' (z, t) := (x, y) in
  let 'tt := tt in
  let fix f (x: nat) {struct x} : nat := x in
  (fun ' (f, x, y) => f (x + y)) (f, t, y).
Print a.
snippets.rendered:
io("coq", { sentence(code("Definition a : nat :=
  let '(x, y) := (1, 2) in
  let ' (z, t) := (x, y) in
  let 'tt := tt in
  let fix f (x: nat) {struct x} : nat := x in
  (fun ' (f, x, y) => f (x + y)) (f, t, y)."), none); sentence(code("Print a."), messages(message(txt("a =
let
'(x, y) := (1, 2) in
 let
 '(_, t) := (x, y) in
  let
  'tt := tt in
   let fix f (x0 : nat) : nat := x0 in
   (fun '(f0, x0, y1) => f0 (x0 + y1)) (f, t, y)
     : nat")))) })

snippets.src:
Goal True \/ False.
  left. exact I.
Qed.
snippets.rendered: io("coq", { sentence(code("Goal True \\/ False."), goals(goal(none, none, code("True \\/ False")))); sentence(code("  left."), goals(goal(none, none, code("True")))); sentence(code("exact I."), none); sentence(code("Qed."), none) })

snippets.src:
Goal forall b: bool, b = b.
  destruct b; [ refine ?[true] | refine ?[false] ].
  all: reflexivity.
Qed.
snippets.rendered: io("coq", { sentence(code("Goal forall b: bool, b = b."), goals(goal(none, none, code("forall b : bool, b = b")))); sentence(code("  destruct b; [ refine ?[true] | refine ?[false] ]."), goals(goal(txt("true"), none, code("true = true")) + goal(txt("false"), none, code("false = false")))); sentence(code("  all: reflexivity."), none); sentence(code("Qed."), none) })
io("coq", { sentence(code("Definition double (n : nat) := n + n."), none) })
io("coq", { sentence(code("Check double."), messages(message(txt("double\n     : nat -> nat")))); sentence(code("Compute double 21."), messages(message(txt("= 42\n: nat")))) })

snippets.src:
Lemma add_0_r : forall n, n + 0 = n.
Proof.
  induction n.
  - reflexivity.
  - simpl. rewrite IHn. reflexivity.
Qed.
snippets.rendered: io("coq", { sentence(code("Lemma add_0_r : forall n, n + 0 = n."), goals(goal(none, none, code("forall n : nat, n + 0 = n")))); sentence(code("Proof."), goals(goal(none, none, code("forall n : nat, n + 0 = n")))); sentence(code("  induction n."), goals(goal(none, none, code("0 + 0 = 0")) + goal(none, hyp(txt("n"), none, code("nat")) + hyp(txt("IHn"), none, code("n + 0 = n")), code("S n + 0 = S n")))); sentence(code("  -"), goals(goal(none, none, code("0 + 0 = 0")))); sentence(code("reflexivity."), none); sentence(code("  -"), goals(goal(none, hyp(txt("n"), none, code("nat")) + hyp(txt("IHn"), none, code("n + 0 = n")), code("S n + 0 = S n")))); sentence(code("simpl."), goals(goal(none, hyp(txt("n"), none, code("nat")) + hyp(txt("IHn"), none, code("n + 0 = n")), code("S (n + 0) = S n")))); sentence(code("rewrite IHn."), goals(goal(none, hyp(txt("n"), none, code("nat")) + hyp(txt("IHn"), none, code("n + 0 = n")), code("S n = S n")))); sentence(code("reflexivity."), none); sentence(code("Qed."), none) })
io("coq", { sentence(code("Require Import Arith."), none); sentence(code("Check Nat.add_0_r."), messages(message(txt("Nat.add_0_r\n     : forall n : nat, n + 0 = n")))) })

Goal True /\ True.
  split; exact I.
Qed.
